# Cesar Canales — Senior Full Stack Software Engineer
> Professional portfolio and contact hub

## About
Cesar Canales is a Senior Full Stack Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience building high-traffic, mission-critical platforms for IBM, 3Pillar Global, Softtek, and Global Hitss. Specializes in React, TypeScript, Node.js, Java 11, and Spring Boot. Based in Hidalgo, Mexico. Open to remote opportunities globally.

## Key Achievements
- Built enterprise data center management system used by 1,000+ clients at 3Pillar Global
- Contributed to Home Depot USA platform serving 1M+ users at IBM
- Migrated 30+ legacy AngularJS components to React, improving search efficiency by 20%
- Led backend architecture with Spring Security & Azure AD OAuth2

## Education
- B.S. Computer Systems Engineering — Universidad Politecnica de Queretaro

## Technical Skills
Frontend: React, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), Angular, HTML5, CSS3, Redux, Material UI
Backend: Node.js, Java 11, Spring Boot, Spring Security, Express, REST, GraphQL, SOAP
Databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
DevOps: Docker, Azure, AWS, CI/CD, GitHub Actions
Testing: Jest, Testing Library, TDD
Methodologies: Agile, Scrum, Code Review, Conventional Commits
